data.title: Teradata Earns Recognition on the Third Annual CRN AI 100 List
data.description: Teradata (stock symbol: TDC) was recently featured on CRN's 2026 AI 100 list for the AI Data and Analytics category. This list, now in its third year, highlights innovative vendors in the field. Teradata was chosen for its cutting-edge contribution to the industry.

data.title: Quanex Names Chad Collins as President, Hardware Solutions
data.description: Quanex Building Products Corporation has recently appointed Chad Collins as the President of Hardware Solutions.

data.title: Pressed Juicery Launches Exclusive Multivitamin + Gut Health 10-Pack at Costco Nationwide
data.description: Pressed Juicery, a well-known California wellness brand famous for its cold-pressed juices, functional shots, and user-friendly routines, is set to introduce a new format designed for repeated use. This new format is tailored to consumers' shopping habits for everyday wellness. The launch will take place in Los Angeles on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Strategy Buys 4,871 Bitcoin For $330M But Sits On $5 Billion In Unrealized Losses
data.description: MSTR, listed on NASDAQ, acquired 4,871 Bitcoin for $329.9 million last week at a rate of $67,718 per coin. This acquisition increases their total Bitcoin holdings to 766,970 (BTC) with an average investment of $75,644 per coin. The recent purchase was primarily funded through $227.3 million from the sale of STRC preferred stock, with the remaining $72 million raised through common stock sales. A report from CryptoQuant revealed that Strategy has accumulated around 44,000 BTC over the last 30 days, making it one of the few institutional channels alongside spot ETFs, which bought about 50,000 BTC during the same period. Holding approximately 3.8% of Bitcoin's circulating supply (20.01 million coins), Strategy remains a significant player in the market.

data.title: Huntington Bank Named Official Consumer Bank of the University of Michigan
data.description: Huntington National Bank (Huntington) has enhanced its collaboration with the University of Michigan by offering tailored banking services, financial literacy programs, and exclusive on-campus assistance to students, faculty, and staff. The partnership, established on April 6, 2026, aims to provide personalized support to the university community. This initiative underscores Huntington's commitment to serving the educational sector by delivering targeted solutions.

data.title: SOVENTURE Reveals Top Spring & Summer Travel Destinations - And Why Activity-Ready Insurance Matters
data.description: In Warwick, Rhode Island on April 6, 2026, travel experts at SOVENTURE are bringing attention to the prime destinations for the upcoming spring and summer travel season. It is highlighted that certain key activities that enhance these trips may not be included in the travel coverage.

data.title: Bottle Nexus Powers National Launch of Three Hearts Rum as E-Commerce Partner
data.description: Bottle Nexus has been selected as the e-commerce platform for the launch of Three Hearts Rum, a premium rum brand co-founded by a team of entrepreneurs in San Diego. The announcement was made on April 6, 2026. Bottle Nexus will facilitate direct-to-consumer sales from presale to the official debut of the product. This partnership will provide customers with seamless online access to the new premium rum offering. Stay tuned for the exciting release of Three Hearts Rum through Bottle Nexus.

data.title: Onix Deepens Strategic Collaboration with Google Cloud to Help Accelerate Enterprise-Scale Cloud, Data, and Agentic AI Transformation
data.description: Onix, a prominent company specializing in Data and AI services-as-software, has revealed their latest collaboration that is set to boost the consumption of Google Cloud by over $500 million. Additionally, this partnership is projected to generate hundreds of millions of dollars in services revenue for Onix. The announcement was made in New York on April 6, 2026.
